_comment: Cinacoin — Cloudflare Workers Production Dashboard Template
_description: Import into Cloudflare Dashboard → Workers → Manage → Analytics → Create Custom Dashboard
title: Cinacoin Workers — Production

widgets.title: 🔢 Total Requests (24h)
widgets.query: SELECT sum(requests) FROM workersInvocationsAdaptive WHERE scriptName IN $service GROUP BY scriptName

widgets.title: 📈 Request Rate
widgets.query: SELECT sum(requests) FROM workersInvocationsAdaptive WHERE scriptName IN $service GROUP BY datetimeHour, scriptName

widgets.title: ❌ Error Rate (5xx %)
widgets.query: SELECT sum(errors) / sum(requests) * 100 FROM workersInvocationsAdaptive WHERE scriptName IN $service GROUP BY datetimeHour, scriptName

widgets.title: ⏱️ P50 Latency
widgets.query: SELECT quantile(0.50, responseTime) FROM workersInvocationsAdaptive WHERE scriptName IN $service GROUP BY datetimeHour, scriptName

widgets.title: ⏱️ P95 / P99 Latency
widgets.query: SELECT quantile(0.95, responseTime), quantile(0.99, responseTime) FROM workersInvocationsAdaptive WHERE scriptName IN $service GROUP BY datetimeHour

widgets.title: 🔥 CPU Time by Service
widgets.query: SELECT sum(cpuTime) FROM workersInvocationsAdaptive WHERE scriptName IN $service GROUP BY datetimeHour, scriptName

widgets.title: 🔄 Subrequests
widgets.query: SELECT sum(subrequests) FROM workersInvocationsAdaptive WHERE scriptName IN $service GROUP BY datetimeHour, scriptName

widgets.title: 📊 Service Health Summary
widgets.query: SELECT scriptName, sum(requests) as total_requests, sum(errors) as total_errors, sum(cpuTime) as total_cpu_ms, quantile(0.95, responseTime) as p95_ms FROM workersInvocationsAdaptive WHERE scriptName IN $service GROUP BY scriptName
